name: aws
description: AWS plugin with AWS Documentation and AWS API MCP servers, setup diagnostics, publish-ready playbooks, broadly useful AWS skills, and repo-specific EC2, SSM, and deployment workflows.

interface.shortDescription: AWS MCP access, setup diagnostics, 32 focused AWS skills, guided playbooks, and repo-aware deployment workflows.
interface.longDescription: Adds AWS Documentation and AWS API MCP servers to Codex, then layers in plugin setup diagnostics, safer AWS API MCP guardrails, a visual skill map, curated example playbooks, release validation helpers, and a broad AWS skill library for common platform work such as IAM, Lambda, API Gateway, S3, ECS, networking, databases, observability, security, infrastructure as code, authentication, Kubernetes, event-driven systems, Bedrock, caching, search, secrets, encryption, DNS, edge security, analytics, and migration, plus repo-specific Parameter Store and EC2 backend deployment workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use AWS docs and APIs to inspect my account, architecture, or service setup.
Diagnose whether this AWS plugin is fully ready to use.
Map my workload to the right AWS services, plugin skills, and next steps.
Review an AWS design, deployment, security, data, or migration workflow safely.
